title: Add Board Footer
excerpt:
Hi guys, 
I’m looking to add a board footer to view an accumulative tracked time figure for all the groups on my board. How do I go about adding this? I can’t seem to find it anywhere! 
Thanks!

posts.author: DannyStudiowide (Danny)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,

I’m looking to add a board footer to view an accumulative tracked time figure for all the groups on my board. How do I go about adding this? I can’t seem to find it anywhere!

Thanks!

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DannyStudiowide, good question! Have you already activated this feature in your monday.labs section from your avatar menu in the bottom left? It should look like this:

image936×168 14.3 KB

Let me know whether this does the trick!
